name: brevo-helper
description: Unofficial Codex plugin for working with Brevo through Brevo MCP and website integration workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use Codex with Brevo contacts, lists, templates, campaigns, analytics, webhooks, and website lead-capture integrations through Brevo's MCP server. This plugin is unofficial and is not made by or endorsed by Brevo.
defaultPrompt: Connect this form to Brevo safely.
Audit my Brevo lead capture flow.
Review this Brevo campaign before sending.
